meta.title: ComplyAI — AI Act compliance for SMEs
meta.description: A suite of AI tools for European SMEs' compliance: AI Act Checker, regulation radar, controls mapping, audit trail, contract review and legal deadline tracking.

hero.title: Regulatory compliance, within every SME's reach.
hero.subtitle: An open suite of AI tools, built in public, to understand which obligations apply to your company, close the gaps and document every decision — with no entry cost.
hero.status: Phase 0 complete: platform online. The first module is under development.

modules.title: The six modules of the suite

items.name: AI Act Compliance Checker
items.description: Classifies the risk of your AI systems under the EU AI Act and generates obligation checklists, gaps and an action plan.

items.name: Regulation Watcher
items.description: Regulatory radar on official EU sources: periodic digests and impact assessment based on your company profile.

items.name: Policy-to-Controls Mapper
items.description: Turns policies and requirements into operational controls with owners, cadence and required evidence.

items.name: Audit Trail Builder
items.description: Append-only log of every human and AI action, searchable and exportable for external auditors.

items.name: Contract Review Agent
items.description: Extracts key clauses from contracts, flags risky or unusual terms and missing standard protections.

items.name: Legal Deadline Tracker
items.description: Tracks obligations, renewals and withdrawal windows with reminders and progress status.

footer.disclaimer: ComplyAI provides informational compliance support and does not constitute legal advice. For decisions with legal effects, consult a qualified professional.
